channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lions secure NFC's No. 1 seed, Broncos and Buccaneers clinch the NFL's final two playoff spots
item.description: The road to the Super Bowl in the NFC will go through Motown. The Detroit Lions secured a No. 1 seed with a 31-9 victory over the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hideki Matsuyama has record-setting start to the PGA Tour season with victory at Kapalua
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Hideki Matsuyama opened the new season with a record performance, though it was hard to tell from his emotions. He was a machine at The Sentry, with 35 holes at birdie or better to finish at 35-under par, both PGA Tour records.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kurtenbach: Nothing went right for the 2024 49ers. Now, everything needs to go right this offseason
item.description: Can the Niners turn 2024 into a repeat of 2020 — a one-year, injury-filled blip? The next seven months will decide.
item.dc:creator: Dieter Kurtenbach, The Mercury News

item.title: Buccaneers beat Saints 27-19 to clinch NFC South and wide receiver Mike Evans surpasses 1,000 yards
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Just 36 seconds away from clinching the NFC South title, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers had another goal to achieve. Take a knee on their 32-yard line and run out the clock? No chance. Mike Evans still needed 5 yards to make history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Warriors’ Steve Kerr still in ‘shock’ over Kings’ firing of Mike Brown
item.description: Brown, a member of the Warriors' coaching staff from 2016-22, was fired Dec. 27 midway through his third season with the Kings.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: Indianapolis Colts owner Jim Irsay intends to bring back longtime general manager Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen for another season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Instant analysis of 49ers’ season-ending 47-24 loss at Arizona Cardinals
item.description: Jauan Jennings' ejection and Isaac Guerendo's cart-off knee injury added to the 49ers' season-long macabre in Sunday's 47-24 season-ending loss to the host Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Bears' game-winning field goal drops Packers in NFC playoff seeding, snaps 10-game losing streak
item.description: The Chicago Bears snapped multiple losing streaks as Cairo Santos drilled a 51-yard field goal to drop the Green Bay Packers in the NFC playoff seeding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos' 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers, who lost quarterback Jordan Love and wide receiver Christian Watson to injuries on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A fast and perfect day for Texans quarterback C.J. Stroud and first-team offense against Titans
item.description: Texans quarterback C.J. Stroud completed all six of his throws for 50 yards and touchdown pass on opening drive before being replaced by backup quarterback Davis Mills.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Diallo goal seals 2-2 draw for Man United against Liverpool
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — Amad Diallo came back to haunt Liverpool with a late equalizer that secured a 2-2 draw for Manchester United against Premier League leader Liverpool on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox Sports captures Saints' moment of silence in first game after deadly terror attack
item.description: Fox Sports captured the somber moment when the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and New Orleans Saints had a moment of silence for those killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego Wave FC announces termination of contract for midfielder Emily van Egmond
item.description: San Diego Wave FC announced Friday that midfielder Emily van Egmond and the club have mutually agreed to terminate her contract.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, matchups and what to know for the 2024 season finale
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Packers have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. See below. GREEN BAY, Wis. — A long, trying 2024 season for the Bears reaches its merciful conclusion Sunday afternoon at Lambeau Field.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Sensabaugh pours in 34 as Jazz crush Miami, 136-100
item.description: MIAMI (AP) - Brice Sensabaugh scored a career-high 34 points, John Collins finished with 24, and the Utah Jazz snapped a five-game losing streak with a 136-100 rout over the Miami Heat on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ravens QB Jackson, the first member of the 4,000-900 club, looks toward playoff run
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson capped a sensational regular season with a rather ordinary performance. It was still plenty good enough to set a pair of NFL records and lead the Baltimore Ravens to a second straight AFC North title.
item.dc:creator: DAVID GINSBURG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens' 355-pound lineman snags interception to clinch division title in victory vs. Browns
item.description: Baltimore Ravens defensive tackle Michael Pierce hauled in the first interception of his NFL career Saturday to close out a division-sealing victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls to retire Derrick Rose's No. 1 jersey
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday that the team would be retiring Derrick Rose’s No. 1 jersey next season. Bulls President & CEO Michael Reinsdorf made the announcement on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers sign star out of Korean baseball league
item.description: If you thought the Los Angeles Dodgers would slow down on player signings because they already assembled a world champion roster, then you were wrong. According to the team on Friday, the Dodgers have added one of this offseason's most sought-after prizes: Korean star second baseman Hyeseong Kim.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: With chance for 3rd straight win, Bulls fall on road to woeful Wizards, 125-107
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After winning two games in a row to close out 2024, the Bulls seemingly had a great opportunity to kick off 2025 with a third straight victory when they visited the nation's capital on Wednesday night to face the woeful Wizards. Things certainly didn't go as planned for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Second chances don’t come around often in life, Ohio State coach Ryan Day told his players in a team meeting before the Rose Bowl.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ben Johnson likely to push for a GM besides Ryan Poles, report says
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Information continues to emerge about the Chicago Bears' looming pursuit of a new head coach. The presumptive top candidate — Ben Johnson — is tied to the latest details suggesting he would want a new general manager if he came to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Camarillo High School to honor NBA star alumnus with jersey retirement
item.description: Camarillo High School will honor one of its most successful alumni when it retires the No. 24 jersey of Jaime Jaquez Jr. later this month.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah HC loses fifth straight game, 4-1 to Edmonton
item.description: EDMONTON (ABC4 Sports) - Connor McDavid and Leon Draisaitl each extended their point streaks to 12 games for the Edmonton Oilers, who won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Rogers Place on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: Blues, Blackhawks close 2024 with the Winter Classic
item.description: It's Winter Classic Day in the Windy City on New Year's Eve. The ultimate outdoor hockey showdown between the cross-state rival St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks is underway.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Classic: Father Judge 80, Carlsbad 70
item.description: In the Third-Place game for the National Bracket of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Father Judge High School from Philadelphia, PA defeats Carlsbad 80-70.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bears wrap up trying 2024 season vs. Packers on Sunday at noon in Green Bay
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the ball left the hand of Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels with no time left on the clock on Oct. 27 in Washington, the Bears were 4-2 and just needed to swat the ball to the ground to finish off their fourth straight win. Instead, the ball was batted into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5
